docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY THEIL, JOANNA AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBOA, HUGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBOA, HUGO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $210.00 - SERVED MAY-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBOA, HUGO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF THEIL, JOANNA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2012 - JUDGMENT. PATRICIA ROSENBERG APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: DONNALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THEIL, JOANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAMBOA, HUGO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $260.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,760.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
